title: Jaggies Begone
description: A Minecraft Fabric client mod that allows the application of 4x FXAA through the vanilla shader system, and forced mipmapping on blocks with cutout type rendering.
body: A Minecraft Fabric client mod that allows the application of 4x FXAA through the vanilla shaders system, and the option to force the game to change blocks that use RenderLayer.Cutout to be RenderLayer.Cutout_Mipped.
